checks.shortDescription: Using a cryptographically weak pseudo-random number generator to generate a security sensitive value may allow an attacker to predict what sensitive value will be generated.

checks.title: Weak encryption: Insufficient key size

checks.title: Cookie security: persistent cookie

checks.title: Weak encryption

checks.shortDescription: Calling the default implementation of 'ToString' returns a value that is unlikely to be what you expect.
checks.title: Use of default ToString()

checks.shortDescription: If-statement with an empty then-branch and no else-branch.
checks.title: Futile conditional

checks.shortDescription: Calling 'GetHashCode()' on integer types is redundant because the method always returns the original value.
checks.title: Useless call to GetHashCode()

checks.shortDescription: A method forwards calls to another method of the same name that is not called independently.
checks.title: Pointless forwarding method

checks.shortDescription: Explicit calls to `ToString()` can be removed when the call appears in a context where an implicit conversion exists.
checks.title: Redundant ToString() call
